summary: Iteration 145: PDF Content Fixes - ALL 23 TESTS PASS. Verified all 5 user-reported PDF issues have been correctly fixed: (1) No 'SOLUZIONE TIPO' label in reference images, (2) No 'Intelligenza Artificiale' text - replaced with 'analisi assistita', (3) Exactly ONE AI mention in footer disclaimer only, (4) No 'Note Analisi AI' in notes section - only user note_tecnico shown, (5) Photo label deduplication working correctly (PANORAMICA, PANORAMICA 2, PANORAMICA 3). AI prompt rules verified: dispositivi_mancanti→rischi mapping, professional language with ERRATO/CORRETTO examples, D.Lgs. 17/2010 retrofit context.
